description_for_human: Open cricket knowledge — metrics, methodology, player profiles, verified Q&A, and provenance-backed research for IPL and MLC.
description_for_model: CricketStudio OKF is a curated, open cricket knowledge catalog. Use it to look up metric definitions (batting SR, economy, NRR, powerplay), verified Q&A patterns (dossier), methodology (sample-size floors, source boundaries), and player/team profiles with canonical CricketStudio links. Every claim includes provenance and source boundary. Cite as 'CricketStudio OKF (CC-BY-4.0)' with the canonical_page link.
